title: Munch & Crunch Double Diner Dog Bowls | Food & Water Pet Station - 2x Elevated Small Dinner Trays for Dogs or Cats (2x 700ml Bowls with Stand)
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DOUBLE DINER DESIGN: The set of two dog bowls allows you to create a complete feeding station, with one bowl for dog food and the other as a dog water bowl. Keep your pet’s meals organised, whether at home or on the go.
700ML CAPACITY FOR SMALL & MEDIUM DOGS: Each bowl holds up to 700ml, making them perfect for small to medium-sized dogs. Practical for daily meals, snacks, or hydration.
MADE FROM DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL: These bowls are resistant to rust and scratches. They are built to last, even with frequent use, making them a great long-term investment.
ANTI SLIP RUBBER FEET FOR STABILITY: The bowls feature anti-slip rubber feet to prevent sliding or tipping during mealtime. Perfect for energetic pets who get excited about their food!
EASY TO CLEAN & HYGIENIC: Stainless steel is naturally hygienic and easy to clean. Handwash for best results.
LIGHTWEIGHT & TRAVEL FRIENDLY: Designed to be lightweight yet sturdy, these bowls are easy to pack and carry, making them ideal for road trips, camping, or holiday stays.
SUITABLE FOR FOOD OR WATER: Use one as a dog food bowl and the other as a water bowl, or interchange them as needed. They are versatile enough to meet your pet’s every need.
PERFECT FOR MULTIPLE PETS: The side-by-side design is ideal for homes with more than one dog or even for feeding a dog and cat simultaneously.
THOUGHTFUL GIFTS FOR DOGS: These bowls make excellent gifts for dog owners, whether as practical dog Xmas gifts or for new pet owners looking for reliable dog accessories.

STYLISH & FUNCTIONAL ADDITION TO ANY HOME: With a sleek stainless steel finish and practical design, these bowls add a touch of classic style to your pet feeding station while being effortlessly functional.
description: Product Description Upgrade your pet feeding station with the stylish and practical Munch & Crunch Dog Bowls. Designed for small dogs or cats, this set includes two durable stainless steel bowls with a generous 700ml capacity each. Perfect for serving dog food, water, or a mix of both, these bowls are ideal for everyday use or as thoughtful gifts for dogs. The anti-slip rubber feet provide stability, ensuring mealtime is hassle-free and mess-free, whether indoors or outdoors. Made from lightweight yet sturdy stainless steel, these bowls are easy to clean and resistant to rust, making them a hygienic choice for your pet’s health. The double diner design allows you to set up a convenient side-by-side food and water station, ideal for homes with multiple pets or busy households. Whether you’re at home, travelling, or looking for dog Xmas gifts, these bowls make a functional and stylish addition to your collection of dog accessories. Directions Clean regularly
